title: Enable/Disable Notifications per Category
description: The system shall allow users to enable or disable notifications per category such as likes, comments, and friend requests.
rationale: Enabling users to control which notifications they receive provides a personalized experience and reduces unnecessary alerts, improving user satisfaction and engagement.
business_value: Improves user satisfaction by allowing them to tailor their notification preferences, potentially leading to higher app retention rates and more active participation in the application's features.

source.description: As a user I need to enable or disable notifications per category (e.g., likes, comments, friend requests) So that I can control which notifications I receive

acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged into the application When I navigate to the notification settings Then I see a list of notification categories with toggles
Given I am on the notification settings page When I toggle off "likes" notifications Then I no longer receive notifications for likes
Given I am on the notification settings page When I toggle on "comments" notifications Then I receive notifications for comments
preconditions: The user is logged into the application.
functional_constraints: Supported notification categories include likes, comments, and friend requests.
edge_cases: What happens if a user tries to toggle a notification category that is not supported by the system?
How does the system handle changes when multiple users are toggling different categories simultaneously?

interfaces.name: Notification Settings Page
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the user interface to display notification settings and receive user inputs.

test_cases.description: Toggle off 'likes' notifications and verify no notifications are received for likes.
test_cases.expected_result: User no longer receives notifications for likes when toggled off.

test_cases.description: Toggle on 'comments' notifications and verify notifications are received for comments.
test_cases.expected_result: User receives notifications for comments when toggled on.
